title: Adopter intent
description: Source of truth committed by an adopter project. Describes desired Magpie capabilities and overrides. The reconciler reads this file and emits a lock.

url.description: Source URL. Optional for git-branch when defaulting to the canonical apache repo.

ref.description: Branch name, tag, or release version depending on method.

domains.description: Domain ids the adopter cares about.

audiences.description: Audience ids the adopter wants skills to address.

risk-tier-max.description: Highest risk tier id the adopter accepts. Skills above this tier are excluded.

integrations.description: Integration ids the adopter has wired up.

exclude.description: Skill ids to force off even when capabilities would include them.

force-include.description: Skill ids to force on even when capabilities would exclude them. Warns if violates risk-tier-max.

pin.description: Map of skill id to pinned semver. Reconciler uses this version instead of latest available.

params.description: Map of skill id to param overrides for that skill. Shape per skill defined in its params.schema.json.
